'''鈭歠-dh-g''' ('''kafadhag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knoll|knoll]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knoll|knoll]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-dh-g
|-
! Lemma
| kafadhag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadhag|thifadhag]] || [[word:jifadhag|jifadhag]] || [[word:shifadhag|shifadhag]] || [[word:kifadhag|kifadhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufadhag|thuthufadhag]] || [[word:jujufadhag|jujufadhag]] || [[word:shushufadhag|shushufadhag]] || [[word:kukufadhag|kukufadhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufadhag|thufadhag]] || [[word:jufadhag|jufadhag]] || [[word:shufadhag|shufadhag]] || [[word:kufadhag|kufadhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufadhag|thufadhag]] || [[word:jufadhag|jufadhag]] || [[word:shufadhag|shufadhag]] || [[word:kufadhag|kufadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefadhag|thefadhag]] || [[word:jefadhag|jefadhag]] || [[word:shefadhag|shefadhag]] || [[word:kefadhag|kefadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofadhag|thothofadhag]] || [[word:jojofadhag|jojofadhag]] || [[word:shoshofadhag|shoshofadhag]] || [[word:kokofadhag|kokofadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofadhag|thofadhag]] || [[word:jofadhag|jofadhag]] || [[word:shofadhag|shofadhag]] || [[word:kofadhag|kofadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofadhag|thofadhag]] || [[word:jofadhag|jofadhag]] || [[word:shofadhag|shofadhag]] || [[word:kofadhag|kofadhag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]] || [[word:fadhag|fadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fadhag|th忙fadhag]] || [[word:j忙fadhag|j忙fadhag]] || [[word:sh忙fadhag|sh忙fadhag]] || [[word:k忙fadhag|k忙fadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafadhag|thathafadhag]] || [[word:jajafadhag|jajafadhag]] || [[word:shashafadhag|shashafadhag]] || [[word:kakafadhag|kakafadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafadhag|thafadhag]] || [[word:jafadhag|jafadhag]] || [[word:shafadhag|shafadhag]] || [[word:kafadhag|kafadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafadhag|thafadhag]] || [[word:jafadhag|jafadhag]] || [[word:shafadhag|shafadhag]] || [[word:kafadhag|kafadhag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafadhag|shafadhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafadhag|goshafadhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafadhag|gokishafadhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafadhagn眉|shafadhagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkn眉|goshafadhagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadhagn眉|gokishafadhagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafadhagsh毛|shafadhagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafadhagnksh毛|goshafadhagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafadhagsh毛|gokishafadhagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadhagro|shafadhagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkro|goshafadhagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadhagro|gokishafadhagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadhagmu|shafadhagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkmu|goshafadhagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadhagmu|gokishafadhagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafadhagsher|shafadhagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafadhagnksher|goshafadhagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafadhagsher|gokishafadhagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafadhagng|shafadhagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkng|goshafadhagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafadhagng|gokishafadhagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafadhagya|shafadhagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkya|goshafadhagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafadhagya|gokishafadhagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafadhagyam|shafadhagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkyam|goshafadhagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafadhagyam|gokishafadhagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadhagn眉sh毛|shafadhagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkn眉sh毛|goshafadhagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadhagn眉sh毛|gokishafadhagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadhagn眉ro|shafadhagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkn眉ro|goshafadhagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadhagn眉ro|gokishafadhagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadhagn眉mu|shafadhagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkn眉mu|goshafadhagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadhagn眉mu|gokishafadhagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadhagsh毛n眉|shafadhagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadhagnksh毛n眉|goshafadhagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadhagsh毛n眉|gokishafadhagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadhagsh毛ro|shafadhagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadhagnksh毛ro|goshafadhagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadhagsh毛ro|gokishafadhagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadhagsh毛mu|shafadhagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadhagnksh毛mu|goshafadhagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadhagsh毛mu|gokishafadhagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadhagron眉|shafadhagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkron眉|goshafadhagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadhagron眉|gokishafadhagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadhagrosh毛|shafadhagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkrosh毛|goshafadhagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadhagrosh毛|gokishafadhagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadhagromu|shafadhagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkromu|goshafadhagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadhagromu|gokishafadhagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadhagmun眉|shafadhagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkmun眉|goshafadhagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadhagmun眉|gokishafadhagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadhagmush毛|shafadhagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkmush毛|goshafadhagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadhagmush毛|gokishafadhagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadhagmuro|shafadhagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadhagnkmuro|goshafadhagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadhagmuro|gokishafadhagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
